archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode Variant) with Luxury Apple-like aesthetics
brand_philosophy: Attention → Leverage. Premium. Quiet. Confident. Internet-native.

typography.headings: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Neue Montreal', sans-serif
typography.rules: Huge spacing, few words, editorial layout. Do not center everything; use asymmetry. Max heading size text-5xl to text-6xl.

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. py-24 to py-32 for major sections. gap-16 to gap-24 for grids.
layout.bento_grid: Grid 12-columns, asymmetrical spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4). Avoid standard 3-column bootstrap looks.
layout.general: Max-width 7xl containers. Ensure breathing room around typography.
layout.surfaces: Cards should use #181818 with 1px border border-white/10 and subtle inner glow. No heavy drop shadows. Glassmorphism for sticky nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#090909]/60.

components.navigation: Sticky top, glassmorphic header. Minimal links. Work With Us CTA.
components.hero: Headline: 'Behind The Internet's Next Creators.' Subheadline: 'We help ambitious people and companies turn attention into leverage.' Dual CTAs. Abstract animated dark gradient backdrop.
components.edamen_framework_visual: A large (min 500x500) animated circular SVG/Framer Motion component. Center: 'ATTENTION' (glowing slightly). Outer Ring: continuous rotation of text 'CONTENT → DISTRIBUTION → TRUST → OPPORTUNITIES → PARTNERSHIPS → LEVERAGE → COMPOUNDING → ATTENTION'. Thin strokes (1px), subtle Apple-style motion.
components.divisions: Two distinct sections: 'Brand Building' and 'Creator Representation'. Use Bento grids for services. Large typography.
components.work_section: Storytelling-driven case studies. Not small portfolio cards, but large editorial image + text overlay layouts.
components.about_section: Founder-led, mission-driven text. Clean typography focus.
components.multi_step_form: Dedicated page for 'Apply for Representation'. Shadcn form, multi-step wizard, store in DB. Fields: Basic Info, Social Profiles, Audience Insights, Analytics, Media Kit, etc.
components.admin_dashboard: Protected route. Minimal Shadcn table for managing applications. Status badges: New, Reviewing, Qualified, Call Scheduled, Signed, Rejected.

animations.scroll_reveals: Framer Motion. Fade in and slide up slightly as elements enter viewport. Use staggered children for lists.
animations.micro_interactions: Buttons: subtle scale/brightness change. Cards: slight lift and border illumination on hover. Framework visual: slow, continuous, infinite rotation.
animations.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background abstract images to simulate depth (Apple Vision Pro style).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Muted text must be legible.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, form inputs, links, and major interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js with the exact colors from this JSON.
Use lucide-react for thin, minimal icons. Avoid chunky generic icons.
Build the 'Edamen Leverage Framework' as a bespoke React component using Framer Motion. It should look proprietary and highly polished.
The admin dashboard must be functional with a mocked backend or real local DB to store the multi-step form submissions.
Apply 'data-testid' attributes extensively to ensure UI testability.
Achieve the 'Linear/Apple' look by relying on 1px borders, generous whitespace, #181818 surface colors, and typography rather than heavy styling.
